channel.title: GitHub Dart Daily Trending
channel.description: Daily Trending of Dart in GitHub

item.title: flutter/flutter
item.description: Flutter makes it easy and fast to build beautiful apps for mobile and beyond

item.title: Predidit/Kazumi
item.description: 基于自定义规则的番剧采集APP，支持流媒体在线观看，支持弹幕。

item.title: imaNNeo/fl_chart
item.description: FL Chart is a highly customizable Flutter chart library that supports Line Chart, Bar Chart, Pie Chart, Scatter Chart, and Radar Chart.

item.title: pichillilorenzo/flutter_inappwebview
item.description: A Flutter plugin that allows you to add an inline webview, to use a headless webview, and to open an in-app browser window.

item.title: ImranR98/Obtainium
item.description: Get Android app updates straight from the source.

item.title: AppFlowy-IO/AppFlowy
item.description: Bring projects, wikis, and teams together with AI. AppFlowy is an AI collaborative workspace where you achieve more without losing control of your data. The best open source alternative to Notion.

item.title: flutter-ml/google_ml_kit_flutter
item.description: A flutter plugin that implements Google's standalone ML Kit

item.title: flutter/samples
item.description: A collection of Flutter examples and demos

item.title: hiddify/hiddify-app
item.description: Multi-platform auto-proxy client, supporting Sing-box, X-ray, TUIC, Hysteria, Reality, Trojan, SSH etc. It’s an open-source, secure and ad-free.

item.title: gskinnerTeam/flutter-wonderous-app
item.description: A showcase app for the Flutter SDK. Wonderous will educate and entertain as you uncover information about some of the most famous structures in the world.

item.title: guozhigq/pilipala
item.description: PiliPala 是使用Flutter开发的BiliBili第三方客户端，感谢使用。

item.title: iampawan/FlutterExampleApps
item.description: [Example APPS] Basic Flutter apps, for flutter devs.

item.title: shorebirdtech/shorebird
item.description: Code Push for Flutter and other tools for Flutter businesses.

item.title: jonataslaw/getx
item.description: Open screens/snackbars/dialogs/bottomSheets without context, manage states and inject dependencies easily with Get.

item.title: academind/flutter-complete-guide-course-resources
item.description: Course resources (code snapshots & slides) for our complete Flutter & Dart course (https://acad.link/flutter).

item.title: wgh136/PicaComic
item.description: A comic app built with Flutter, supporting multiple comic sources.

item.title: getsentry/sentry-dart
item.description: Sentry SDK for Dart and Flutter

item.title: lichess-org/mobile
item.description: Lichess mobile app v2

item.title: chen08209/FlClash
item.description: A multi-platform proxy client based on ClashMeta,simple and easy to use, open-source and ad-free.

item.title: fluttercommunity/plus_plugins
item.description: Flutter Community Plus Plugins

item.title: felangel/bloc
item.description: A predictable state management library that helps implement the BLoC design pattern

item.title: Notsfsssf/pixez-flutter
item.description: 一个支持免代理直连及查看动图的第三方Pixiv flutter客户端

item.title: flutter/website
item.description: Flutter documentation web site

item.title: anandnet/Harmony-Music
item.description: A cross platform App for streaming Music
